debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp₂ :
  (tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ ≠ []) → head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ []
ind_hyp₁ : tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_neg₁ : ¬tail₁ ≠ []
⊢ List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []

proof:
simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    have h_singleton_ne : [head₁] ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                    clear ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁ h_head_tail_neq_nil h_neg₁
                    generalize [head₁] = acc at h_singleton_ne
                    induction (head₂ :: tail₂) generalizing acc with
                    | nil => exact h_singleton_ne
                    | cons hd tl ih =>
                      simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                      apply ih
                      simp only [afuncDef]
                      split_ifs
                      · exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil h_singleton_ne _
                      · exact h_singleton_ne
failed_attempts:
simp only [not_not] at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons, ne_eq, List.cons_ne_nil, not_true_eq_false, not_false_eq_true]

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                    simp only [afuncDef]
                    split_ifs with h_eq
                    · simp only [List.append_eq, List.cons_append, List.nil_append, ne_eq,
                        List.cons_ne_self, not_false_eq_true]
                      intro h_fold
                      have : [head₁] ++ [(head₂.1, head₂.2)] ≠ [] := by simp
                      -- After one step, we have a non-empty list
                      clear h_fold
                      have start_ne : [head₁] ++ [(head₂.1, head₂.2)] ≠ [] := by simp
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        simp only [afuncDef] at ih ⊢
                        split_ifs <;> simp [ih]
                    · intro h_fold
                      have start_ne : [head₁] ≠ [] := by simp
                      clear h_fold
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        simp only [afuncDef] at ih ⊢
                        split_ifs <;> simp [ih]

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    rw [afuncDef]
                    simp only
                    split_ifs with h_eq
                    · simp [List.foldl]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : List.foldl afunc ([head₁] ++ [(head₂.1, head₂.2)]) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ head₂ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl_cons]
                          rw [afuncDef]
                          simp only
                          split_ifs <;> apply ih
                      exact this h_contra
                    · simp [List.foldl]
                      intro h_contra
                      have : List.foldl afunc [head₁] tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl_cons]
                          rw [afuncDef]
                          simp only
                          split_ifs with h
                          · apply ih
                          · apply ih
                      exact this h_contra

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp_all

simp only [not_not] at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons, ne_eq]
                    cases h_afunc_head : afunc [head₁] head₂ with
                    | nil =>
                      simp [afuncDef] at h_afunc_head
                      split_ifs at h_afunc_head with h_idx <;> simp at h_afunc_head
                    | cons hd' tl' =>
                      rw [h_afunc_head]
                      clear h_afunc_head
                      induction tail₂ generalizing hd' tl' with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons hd₂ tl₂ ih₂ =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        cases h_next : afunc (hd' :: tl') hd₂ with
                        | nil =>
                          simp [afuncDef] at h_next
                          split_ifs at h_next with h_idx <;> simp at h_next
                        | cons hd'' tl'' =>
                          exact ih₂ hd'' tl'' h_next
mpty)

simp [List.foldl_cons]
                            split_ifs <;> simp [*]
                        · exact ih

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                    split_ifs <;> simp

apply ih
                          simp [afuncDef]
                          split_ifs <;> simp [hl₁]
                      exact this [head₁, head₂] tail₂ (List.cons_ne_nil _ _) h_foldl_nil

simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                    rw [afuncDef]
                    simp only
                    split_ifs with h_eq
                    · exact afunc_monotone ([head₁] ++ [(head₂.1, head₂.2)]) tail₂ (by simp)
                    · exact afunc_monotone [head₁] tail₂ (by simp)

simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons, ne_eq]
                    cases Decidable.em (index₁ = head₂.2) with
                    | inl h_eq =>
                      simp only [afuncDef, h_eq, ↓reduceDIte, List.singleton_append]
                      clear ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁ h_head_tail_neq_nil
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        split <;> simp [List.append_ne_nil, ih]
                    | inr h_neq =>
                      simp only [afuncDef, h_neq, ↓reduceDIte]
                      clear ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁ h_head_tail_neq_nil
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        split <;> simp [List.append_ne_nil, ih]
split_ifs <;> simp [List.foldl, *]

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    rw [afuncDef]
                    simp only
                    split_ifs with h_eq
                    · simp [List.foldl]
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        rw [afuncDef] at ih ⊢
                        simp only at ih ⊢
                        split_ifs <;> simp [List.foldl, *]
                    · simp [List.foldl]
                      induction tail₂ with
                      | nil => simp
                      | cons h t ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]
                        rw [afuncDef] at ih ⊢
                        simp only at ih ⊢
                        split_ifs <;> simp [List.foldl, *]

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp only [List.cons_append, List.nil_append]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [List.foldl] at h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp at h_contra
                    · have : List.foldl afunc [head₁, (head₂.1, head₂.2)] tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        clear h_contra
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ head₂
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl]
                          split
                          · apply ih
                          · apply ih
                      exact this h_contra
                    · have : List.foldl afunc [head₁] tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        clear h_contra
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁
                        case nil => simp
                        case cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl]
                          split
                          · have : List.foldl afunc [head₁, (hd.1, hd.2)] tl ≠ [] := by
                              induction tl generalizing head₁ hd
                              case nil => simp
                              case cons hd' tl' ih' =>
                                simp [List.foldl]
                                split <;> apply ih'
                            exact this
                          · apply ih
                      exact this h_contra

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp at h_contra

simp at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp at h_contra

simp [afuncDef]
                        split_ifs <;> simp
                    exact this h_contra

simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                    have h_step : ∀ p : List _, p ≠ [] → afunc p head₂ ≠ [] := by
                      intro p hp
                      simp only [afuncDef]
                      split_ifs <;> simp [hp]
                    have h_start_ne : afunc [head₁] head₂ ≠ [] := by
                      simp only [afuncDef]
                      split_ifs <;> simp
                    clear h_step
                    induction tail₂ generalizing head₂
                    case nil => exact h_start_ne
                    case cons hd tl ih =>
                      simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                      apply ih
                      simp only [afuncDef]
                      split_ifs <;> simp

simp at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                    split_ifs <;> simp

simp [afuncDef]
                        split_ifs <;> simp [hl]
                    exact h_mono _ h_start_nonempty

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp_all

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra <;> simp at h_contra

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                    simp only [afuncDef]
                    split_ifs with h_eq
                    · simp only [List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil, List.cons_ne_nil, not_false_eq_true]
                      intro h
                      have : List.foldl afunc ([head₁] ++ [(head₂.1, head₂.2)]) tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ head₂ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih => 
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          simp only [afuncDef]
                          split_ifs <;> simp [List.cons_ne_nil, ih]
                      exact this h
                    · intro h
                      have : List.foldl afunc [head₁] tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                          simp only [afuncDef]
                          split_ifs <;> simp [List.cons_ne_nil, ih]
                      exact this h

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split_ifs at h_contra <;> simp at h_contra

simp at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    simp [List.foldl_cons]
                    intro h_contra
                    simp [afuncDef] at h_contra
                    split at h_contra
                    · simp at h_contra
                    · have : List.foldl afunc [head₁] tail₂ ≠ [] := by
                        clear h_contra
                        induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ with
                        | nil => simp
                        | cons hd tl ih =>
                          simp [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                          split
                          · apply ih
                          · apply ih
                      exact this h_contra
successful_attempts:
simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    have h_singleton_ne : [head₁] ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                    clear ind_hyp₂ ind_hyp₁ h_head_tail_neq_nil h_neg₁
                    generalize [head₁] = acc at h_singleton_ne
                    induction (head₂ :: tail₂) generalizing acc with
                    | nil => exact h_singleton_ne
                    | cons hd tl ih =>
                      simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                      apply ih
                      simp only [afuncDef]
                      split_ifs
                      · exact List.append_ne_nil_of_left_ne_nil h_singleton_ne _
                      · exact h_singleton_ne

simp only [ne_eq, not_not] at h_neg₁
                    subst h_neg₁
                    intro h_contra
                    have : [head₁] ≠ [] := List.cons_ne_nil _ _
                    have afunc_preserves : ∀ l₁ l₂, l₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l₁ l₂ ≠ [] := by
                      intro l₁ l₂ hl₁
                      induction l₂ generalizing l₁ with
                      | nil => simpa
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons]
                        apply ih
                        simp only [afuncDef]
                        split_ifs <;> simp [hl₁]
                    exact afunc_preserves [head₁] (head₂ :: tail₂) this h_contra

push_neg at h_neg₁
                    rw [h_neg₁]
                    intro h_contra
                    have h_mono : ∀ (l₁ l₂ : List _), l₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l₁ l₂ ≠ [] := by
                      intro l₁ l₂ hl₁
                      induction l₂ generalizing l₁ with
                      | nil => exact hl₁
                      | cons hd tl ih =>
                        simp only [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                        split_ifs
                        · apply ih; simp
                        · apply ih; exact hl₁
                    exact h_mono [head₁] (head₂ :: tail₂) (by simp) h_contra
